positive: An aesthetically pleasing and clean-lined geometric design featuring stylized woodland creatures integrated with abstract botanical patterns. The main subject should be a serene, symmetrical arrangement of minimalist animals (e.g., fox, deer, owl) and flourishing foliage. Use a limited, earthy color palette: deep teal, terracotta, muted sage green, and cream accents. The composition must be centered, highly contrasted, and suitable for a repeat pattern print on fabric. The style should blend Scandinavian minimalism with Art Nouveau botanical motifs, rendered as clean vector illustrations with defined edges and strong silhouettes. Flat design aesthetic with subtle gradient overlays for depth. High detail, perfect for apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, messy, collage, noise, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy anatomy, deformed, excess details, busy background
